channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Subnautica 2 Roadmap and 2 Million Sales Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Unknown Worlds has released their newest game this week and Subnautica 2's 2 million sales show that the game is the latest sensation in the survival field. They've also premiered a Subnautica 2 roadmap so that the millions of players have some idea of what is coming in the near future.

In their post, Unknown Worlds doesn't try to tie exact dates to their updates they do share what the plans for Subnautica 2 1.1, and Subnautica 1.2 are along with an ongoing commitment to fix bugs, tune balance, optimize, and other ongoing updates.

Subnautica 2 1.1 Early Access Plans

For Subnautica 2 1.1, it is set to be a quality of life focused update. New features planned for it include more passive biomod slots, storage cache, and Sprinting. Beyond these additions, there will be improvements to the biomod system, blight encounters, wrecks gameplay, vehicle docking and fabrication, the PDA databank, and voicelogs priority system.

Subnautica 2 1.2 Early Access Plans

With Subnautica 2 1.2, the plan is to focus on improving the co-operative experience, the headline new feature for the sequel. In this update they will be adding voice chat, emotes, player trading, player revive, and additional customization. There will also be work done to HUD signals, the base builder tool, and pinned recipes.

After these first two updates, Unknown Worlds shared the following as part of their major expansion updates in the future:

  • Expanding the world
  • New Biomes
  • New Creatures
  • New Resources
  • New Tools
  • New Vehicle 
  • Next Chapter of the Story

All of these plans are subject to change based on what feedback they receive. Unknown Worlds encourages players to use the in-game feedback tool to share thoughts, so they can get more user feedback and work to prioritize what users are interested in having changed.

Subnautica 2 Sales

Within 12 hours of it's release Subnautica 2 sales had crossed 2 million copies sold across PC and Xbox. This wave of players was also shown by a concurrent player count of 651 000 across Steam, Epic, and Xbox, with over 467 000 of those on Steam alone. This marks around 9 times as much as Subnautica 1 had.

A longtime lover of speculative fiction, in almost all its forms, Don joined TechRaptor in 2014 on a whim sending in an application as he was looking for… More about Don
